title: More Tools&Armor Remastered
description: Adds Copper, Steel, and Ruby to Minecraft, including new ores, tools, armor, and blocks. These materials expand the game's progression with new equipment to discover and craft while mining underground.
body:
**More Tools&Armor Remastered**

This mod adds new ores, tools, armor, and blocks to Minecraft to expand progression and give players more materials to discover underground.

**Features**

🔸 **Copper Tools & Armor**
Early-game equipment crafted from copper ingots. Slightly stronger than stone and useful before iron.

🔸 **Steel Tools**
A stronger metal crafted from steel ingots, providing better durability and performance than copper.

🔸 **Ruby Ore & Gear**
A rare gemstone found underground. Ruby tools and armor are powerful and offer strong late-game equipment.

🔸 **New Blocks**
* Steel Block
* Ruby Block
* Steel Ore
* Ruby Ore

🔸 **World Generation**

* Ruby ore generates underground in caves
* Steel ore generates commonly in stone layers

**Equipment Added**

* Swords
* Pickaxes
* Axes
* Shovels
* Hoes
* Armor sets
If theres any problems please tell me! and some bugs or texture glitch may happen.
